project.name: FitCheck
project.description: Web application that scans e-commerce product pages and determines vehicle compatibility using Playwright rendering and a two-stage LangChain LLM pipeline

memories.title: SPA-aware vehicle compatibility scanner
memories.content:
SPA-aware vehicle compatibility scanner

Role in project: End-to-end web app that accepts a product URL and vehicle description, renders the page in Chromium, extracts fitment signals, and returns structured compatibility analysis

Advantages over alternatives: Handles JavaScript-rendered storefronts and chains two LLM stages with early exit instead of brittle regex-only fitment parsers

Adoption rationale: End-to-end web app that accepts a product URL and vehicle description, renders the page in Chromium, extracts fitment signals, and returns structured compatibility analysis. Advantages over alternatives: Handles JavaScript-rendered storefronts and chains two LLM stages with early exit instead of brittle regex-only fitment parsers.

Used FastAPI, Playwright, LangChain as End-to-end web app that accepts a product URL and vehicle description, renders the page in Chromium, extracts fitment signals, and returns structured compatibility analysis, leveraging Handles JavaScript-rendered storefronts and chains two LLM stages with early exit instead of brittle regex-only fitment parsers.

Advantages over alternatives: Handles JavaScript-rendered storefronts and chains two LLM stages with early exit instead of brittle regex-only fitment parsers.

memories.title: Token-efficient LLM fitment analysis
memories.content:
Token-efficient LLM fitment analysis

Role in project: Combines multi-source HTML extraction, rule-based prefilter scoring, and conditional second-stage analyze call to minimize tokens per scan

Advantages over alternatives: Avoids sending full page HTML to the LLM and skips analyze entirely when no fitment data exists

Adoption rationale: Combines multi-source HTML extraction, rule-based prefilter scoring, and conditional second-stage analyze call to minimize tokens per scan. Advantages over alternatives: Avoids sending full page HTML to the LLM and skips analyze entirely when no fitment data exists.

Used LangChain, BeautifulSoup4 as Combines multi-source HTML extraction, rule-based prefilter scoring, and conditional second-stage analyze call to minimize tokens per scan, leveraging Avoids sending full page HTML to the LLM and skips analyze entirely when no fitment data exists.

memories.advantages_over_alternatives: Avoids sending full page HTML to the LLM and skips analyze entirely when no fitment data exists
memories.adoption_rationale: Combines multi-source HTML extraction, rule-based prefilter scoring, and conditional second-stage analyze call to minimize tokens per scan. Advantages over alternatives: Avoids sending full page HTML to the LLM and skips analyze entirely when no fitment data exists.

memories.title: Marketplace bot-block diagnostics
memories.content:
Marketplace bot-block diagnostics

Role in project: Fetch layer detects vendor-specific bot protection and returns structured suggestions and optional debug headers/body preview for 403 and challenge pages

Advantages over alternatives: Operators can diagnose eBay/Amazon blocks on VPS deployments without SSH log diving; debug mode exposed in UI and API

Adoption rationale: Fetch layer detects vendor-specific bot protection and returns structured suggestions and optional debug headers/body preview for 403 and challenge pages. Advantages over alternatives: Operators can diagnose eBay/Amazon blocks on VPS deployments without SSH log diving; debug mode exposed in UI and API.

Used Playwright, FastAPI as Fetch layer detects vendor-specific bot protection and returns structured suggestions and optional debug headers/body preview for 403 and challenge pages, leveraging Operators can diagnose eBay/Amazon blocks on VPS deployments without SSH log diving; debug mode exposed in UI and API.

Role in project: Hosts the REST API (/api/analyze, /api/health), serves the static frontend, registers middleware (CORS, rate limit), and centralizes AppError exception handling

Typical purpose: Async Python web framework for building typed HTTP APIs

Advantages over alternatives: Native async fits Playwright fetch and LangChain ainvoke; automatic OpenAPI docs and Pydantic request/response validation without Flask/Django boilerplate

Adoption rationale: Hosts the REST API (/api/analyze, /api/health), serves the static frontend, registers middleware (CORS, rate limit), and centralizes AppError exception handling. Advantages over alternatives: Native async fits Playwright fetch and LangChain ainvoke; automatic OpenAPI docs and Pydantic request/response validation without Flask/Django boilerplate.

memories.title: Playwright
memories.content:
Playwright: Launches headless Chromium to render product pages (including SPAs) before HTML extraction; singleton browser reused across requests with lifespan cleanup

Role in project: Launches headless Chromium to render product pages (including SPAs) before HTML extraction; singleton browser reused across requests with lifespan cleanup

Typical purpose: Browser automation for reliable page rendering and network-aware fetching

Advantages over alternatives: Executes JavaScript for Next.js/Vue storefronts that static HTTP clients cannot render; built-in navigation and response inspection for bot-block diagnostics

Adoption rationale: Launches headless Chromium to render product pages (including SPAs) before HTML extraction; singleton browser reused across requests with lifespan cleanup. Advantages over alternatives: Executes JavaScript for Next.js/Vue storefronts that static HTTP clients cannot render; built-in navigation and response inspection for bot-block diagnostics.

memories.advantages_over_alternatives: Executes JavaScript for Next.js/Vue storefronts that static HTTP clients cannot render; built-in navigation and response inspection for bot-block diagnostics
memories.adoption_rationale: Launches headless Chromium to render product pages (including SPAs) before HTML extraction; singleton browser reused across requests with lifespan cleanup. Advantages over alternatives: Executes JavaScript for Next.js/Vue storefronts that static HTTP clients cannot render; built-in navigation and response inspection for bot-block diagnostics.

memories.title: LangChain
memories.content:
LangChain: LCEL chains for two-stage pipeline: extract product/fitment JSON from page text, then analyze vehicle compatibility; chains cached per provider and stage

Role in project: LCEL chains for two-stage pipeline: extract product/fitment JSON from page text, then analyze vehicle compatibility; chains cached per provider and stage

Typical purpose: Composable LLM application framework with prompts, parsers, and provider adapters

Advantages over alternatives: Prompt | llm | parser pipelines are testable and swappable; provider-specific chat models plug in without rewriting orchestration

Adoption rationale: LCEL chains for two-stage pipeline: extract product/fitment JSON from page text, then analyze vehicle compatibility; chains cached per provider and stage. Advantages over alternatives: Prompt | llm | parser pipelines are testable and swappable; provider-specific chat models plug in without rewriting orchestration.

Used LangChain as LCEL chains for two-stage pipeline: extract product/fitment JSON from page text, then analyze vehicle compatibility; chains cached per provider and stage, leveraging Prompt | llm | parser pipelines are testable and swappable; provider-specific chat models plug in without rewriting orchestration.

memories.content:

Advantages over alternatives: Protects expensive Playwright+LLM pipeline from abuse without custom Redis-backed limiter for a single-node deployment

Adoption rationale: Per-IP rate limiting (default 10 req/min) on analyze endpoint via SlowAPIMiddleware and shared Limiter keyed by remote address. Advantages over alternatives: Protects expensive Playwright+LLM pipeline from abuse without custom Redis-backed limiter for a single-node deployment.

memories.title: Two-stage LLM pipeline with early exit
memories.content:
Two-stage LLM pipeline with early exit: Extract stage pulls product and fitment data; analyze stage runs only when fitment is detected

Role in project: Skips second LLM call when extract finds no fitment, returning a no-fitment compatibility result immediately

Advantages over alternatives: Cuts token cost and latency roughly in half on pages without vehicle data; keeps analyze prompt focused on fitment matching

Adoption rationale: Skips second LLM call when extract finds no fitment, returning a no-fitment compatibility result immediately. Advantages over alternatives: Cuts token cost and latency roughly in half on pages without vehicle data; keeps analyze prompt focused on fitment matching.
memories.role_in_project: Skips second LLM call when extract finds no fitment, returning a no-fitment compatibility result immediately
memories.advantages_over_alternatives: Cuts token cost and latency roughly in half on pages without vehicle data; keeps analyze prompt focused on fitment matching
memories.adoption_rationale: Skips second LLM call when extract finds no fitment, returning a no-fitment compatibility result immediately. Advantages over alternatives: Cuts token cost and latency roughly in half on pages without vehicle data; keeps analyze prompt focused on fitment matching.

memories.title: SSRF-safe URL validation
memories.content:
SSRF-safe URL validation: Blocks localhost, private IPs, file://, internal hostnames, and DNS rebinding before any fetch

Role in project: validate_url resolves hostnames and rejects private/loopback targets to prevent server-side request forgery on user-supplied product URLs

Advantages over alternatives: Defense in depth beyond scheme checks; socket resolution catches rebinding to metadata endpoints like 169.254.169.254

Adoption rationale: validate_url resolves hostnames and rejects private/loopback targets to prevent server-side request forgery on user-supplied product URLs. Advantages over alternatives: Defense in depth beyond scheme checks; socket resolution catches rebinding to metadata endpoints like 169.254.169.254.

memories.adoption_rationale: validate_url resolves hostnames and rejects private/loopback targets to prevent server-side request forgery on user-supplied product URLs. Advantages over alternatives: Defense in depth beyond scheme checks; socket resolution catches rebinding to metadata endpoints like 169.254.169.254.

memories.title: Structured multi-source content extraction
memories.content:
Structured multi-source content extraction: Combines JSON-LD, Next.js __NEXT_DATA__, OG tags, meta, and fitment DOM selectors

Role in project: extract_content merges heterogeneous e-commerce signals into combined_text for downstream prefilter and LLM stages

Advantages over alternatives: Works across Shopify, Next.js, and custom fitment tables without per-retailer scraper modules

Adoption rationale: extract_content merges heterogeneous e-commerce signals into combined_text for downstream prefilter and LLM stages. Advantages over alternatives: Works across Shopify, Next.js, and custom fitment tables without per-retailer scraper modules.

memories.adoption_rationale: extract_content merges heterogeneous e-commerce signals into combined_text for downstream prefilter and LLM stages. Advantages over alternatives: Works across Shopify, Next.js, and custom fitment tables without per-retailer scraper modules.

memories.title: Rule-based LLM prefilter
memories.content:
Rule-based LLM prefilter: Scores lines by fitment keywords and penalizes noise before sending text to LLM

Role in project: prefilter_content ranks and truncates extracted text to high-signal fitment lines within max_chars budget

Advantages over alternatives: Reduces input tokens and hallucination risk without an extra LLM summarization call

Adoption rationale: prefilter_content ranks and truncates extracted text to high-signal fitment lines within max_chars budget. Advantages over alternatives: Reduces input tokens and hallucination risk without an extra LLM summarization call.
memories.role_in_project: prefilter_content ranks and truncates extracted text to high-signal fitment lines within max_chars budget
memories.advantages_over_alternatives: Reduces input tokens and hallucination risk without an extra LLM summarization call
memories.adoption_rationale: prefilter_content ranks and truncates extracted text to high-signal fitment lines within max_chars budget. Advantages over alternatives: Reduces input tokens and hallucination risk without an extra LLM summarization call.

memories.title: LLM provider fallback
memories.content:
LLM provider fallback: Anthropic-first with OpenAI retry on quota/rate-limit errors

Role in project: _invoke_with_fallback iterates get_provider_order and retries on FALLBACK_ERROR_MARKERS when a second API key is configured

Advantages over alternatives: Improves uptime during provider outages without manual failover configuration per request

Adoption rationale: _invoke_with_fallback iterates get_provider_order and retries on FALLBACK_ERROR_MARKERS when a second API key is configured. Advantages over alternatives: Improves uptime during provider outages without manual failover configuration per request.
memories.role_in_project: _invoke_with_fallback iterates get_provider_order and retries on FALLBACK_ERROR_MARKERS when a second API key is configured
memories.advantages_over_alternatives: Improves uptime during provider outages without manual failover configuration per request
memories.adoption_rationale: _invoke_with_fallback iterates get_provider_order and retries on FALLBACK_ERROR_MARKERS when a second API key is configured. Advantages over alternatives: Improves uptime during provider outages without manual failover configuration per request.

memories.title: Bot protection diagnostics
memories.content:
Bot protection diagnostics: Detects Cloudflare, eBay, Amazon, and generic CAPTCHA interstitials in fetch responses

Role in project: detect_bot_protection and build_fetch_diagnostics enrich FETCH_BLOCKED errors with vendor, suggestions, and optional debug payload

Advantages over alternatives: Actionable error responses for marketplace bot blocks instead of opaque 403 failures; supports per-request debug mode

Adoption rationale: detect_bot_protection and build_fetch_diagnostics enrich FETCH_BLOCKED errors with vendor, suggestions, and optional debug payload. Advantages over alternatives: Actionable error responses for marketplace bot blocks instead of opaque 403 failures; supports per-request debug mode.

memories.advantages_over_alternatives: Actionable error responses for marketplace bot blocks instead of opaque 403 failures; supports per-request debug mode
memories.adoption_rationale: detect_bot_protection and build_fetch_diagnostics enrich FETCH_BLOCKED errors with vendor, suggestions, and optional debug payload. Advantages over alternatives: Actionable error responses for marketplace bot blocks instead of opaque 403 failures; supports per-request debug mode.

memories.title: Pipeline orchestration service
memories.content:
Pipeline orchestration service: analyzer.analyze_product sequences validate → fetch → extract → prefilter → LLM with per-stage timings

Role in project: Single orchestrator coordinates services and returns AnalyzeResponse with usage and timings for observability

Advantages over alternatives: Route handlers stay thin; each stage is independently testable and timed for performance tuning

Adoption rationale: Single orchestrator coordinates services and returns AnalyzeResponse with usage and timings for observability. Advantages over alternatives: Route handlers stay thin; each stage is independently testable and timed for performance tuning.
memories.role_in_project: Single orchestrator coordinates services and returns AnalyzeResponse with usage and timings for observability
memories.advantages_over_alternatives: Route handlers stay thin; each stage is independently testable and timed for performance tuning
memories.adoption_rationale: Single orchestrator coordinates services and returns AnalyzeResponse with usage and timings for observability. Advantages over alternatives: Route handlers stay thin; each stage is independently testable and timed for performance tuning.

memories.title: Typed application error taxonomy
memories.content:
Typed application error taxonomy: AppError with ErrorCode enum mapped to HTTP status and structured JSON error bodies

Role in project: Consistent error codes (URL_BLOCKED, FETCH_BLOCKED, LLM_ERROR, etc.) consumed by frontend for user-facing messages and retry hints

Advantages over alternatives: Clients distinguish validation vs fetch vs LLM failures without parsing free-text exception messages

Adoption rationale: Consistent error codes (URL_BLOCKED, FETCH_BLOCKED, LLM_ERROR, etc.) consumed by frontend for user-facing messages and retry hints. Advantages over alternatives: Clients distinguish validation vs fetch vs LLM failures without parsing free-text exception messages.

memories.title: FastAPI serves static frontend from / and /static; POST /api/analyze drives the ...
memories.content: FastAPI serves static frontend from / and /static; POST /api/analyze drives the full pipeline orchestrated by analyzer.analyze_product.

memories.title: Playwright browser is a process-wide singleton launched on first fetch and close...
memories.content: Playwright browser is a process-wide singleton launched on first fetch and closed on app lifespan shutdown.

memories.title: LLM_PROVIDER=auto prefers Anthropic then OpenAI; both API keys enable transparen...
memories.content: LLM_PROVIDER=auto prefers Anthropic then OpenAI; both API keys enable transparent fallback on rate limits.

memories.title: Docker image installs Chromium via playwright install; compose shm_size 1gb prev...
memories.content: Docker image installs Chromium via playwright install; compose shm_size 1gb prevents browser crashes under load.

memories.title: Optional Bright Data residential proxy settings exist in config for datacenter I...
memories.content: Optional Bright Data residential proxy settings exist in config for datacenter IP bypass (disabled by default).

memories.title: Response includes per-stage timings (validate, fetch, extract, prefilter, llm_ex...
memories.content: Response includes per-stage timings (validate, fetch, extract, prefilter, llm_extract, llm_analyze) and token usage per LLM stage.
